'''TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated''' was a diversified corporation best known for its [[Starship/Legends|starships]].

==History==
Based on [[Narg]] in the [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]], TransGalMeg competed heavily with [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Co.]] in a number of varying markets, with primary focuses on mining and colonization.

The firm produced a number of transport vessels for internal use to avoid the high cost of shipping firms, and the designs became popular for their size, speed and durability. This growth prompted a major shift in the corporation's resource towards starship development and technological manufacturing.
[[File:Vaksai_XWM.png|thumb|left|250px|TransGalMeg designed the [[Kihraxz assault fighter]].]]
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], TransGalMeg sided with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and received a lucrative subcontract from [[Kuat Systems Engineering/Legends|Kuat Systems Engineering]] for the [[Hyperspace transport ring/Legends|hyperspace transport ring]] for the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aetheresprite''-class]] and [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Eta-2 ''Actis''-class interceptors]].<ref name="HoloNet News">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|jediwatch/13314_1.html|New Jedi Starfighter Unveiled}}</ref>

However, it is interesting to note that the company also produced the [[Bulwark Mark I]], which went on to be built by the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] and used in the [[Bulwark Fleet]].

Its stance during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] was less clear. Under the leadership Chief Administrator [[Braig Farool]], TransGalMeg aligned itself firmly with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. After discovering Narg in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], the Empire granted TransGalMeg provisional protectorate authority of the world. It was the Empire's hope that by allowing TransGalMeg to manage the planet for ten years, it would give its exceptionally xenophobic Humans a chance to prepare for entrance into the galactic community. Thus, the Chief Administrator acted as Narg's planetary [[Governor/Legends|governor]] and moved the firm's corporate headquarters from [[Pako Ramoon]] in the [[Grohl sector/Legends|Grohl sector]] to Narg. Despite its alignment with the Empire, TransGalMeg produced starships for [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]],<ref name="Star Wars Galaxies">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=66887&resource=features|text=Ships: TransGalMeg "Kihraxz"|nobackup=1}}</ref> and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. TransGalMeg also manufacturerd the [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|''Xiytiar''-class transport]], one of which came to be known as the ''[[Hyperspace Marauder]], ''owned by [[Lo Khan]].
